title: The Voice -- Permissions Ledger
note: Every recording in the archive index requires a documented permission record before excerpts can be used in the chapter. This ledger documents the permission status per recording. Where permission is not granted, the recording appears in the index but the chapter directs readers to the host institution for access.

status_vocabulary.open: Recording is publicly accessible. No additional permission required for indexing and linking.
status_vocabulary.institutional: Institution has published the recording with documented terms of use. Chapter complies with stated terms.
status_vocabulary.pending: Permission not yet sought. Recording indexed but no excerpts used.
status_vocabulary.not-required: Recording referenced in index only. No audio or transcript excerpts presented.
status_vocabulary.restricted: Institution restricts access. Chapter links to institution but does not present excerpts.
